description: iDenfy provides identity verification, business verification, AML screening, fraud prevention, bank verification, and face authentication services. Its platform lets businesses run KYC/KYB and related compliance checks through hosted flows and APIs.
summary: iDenfy exposes a public HTTP API at `https://ivs.idenfy.com` authenticated with an API key+secret over HTTP Basic Auth, plus a public read-only documentation MCP server.
